tldr.title: Amazon Redshift adds Reserved Instance upfront pricing options for RG instances
tldr.author: aws@amazon.com
bullets: Amazon Redshift announces the availability of All Upfront and Partial Upfront payment options for 1-year and 3-year reserved instances for RG instances.
Reserved instances allow customers to benefit from significant savings over on-demand rates.
The new payment options join the previously available No Upfront option, giving customers greater flexibility to optimize compute costs based on their financial preferences.

tldr.title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
tldr.author: Scharon Harding
bullets: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."
